text:
Filial Affection is the 49th episode of Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood.

Episode Notes

This episode is adapted from content in Chapter 88: The Understanding Between Father and Son and Chapter 89: Soldiers' Return.
The post-credits scene of this episode is somewhat notorious as unlike most others, it is absolutely vital to the narrative. In particular, the immediately following episode picks up where the post-credits scene left off instead of where the main portion of the episode ended, so if the scene is unknowingly skipped by a viewer (either due to routinely skipping post-credits scenes or simply being unaware of them), the result is a jarring experience where Mustang and his unit are suddenly in a seemingly unexplained shootout with Mrs. Bradley, who is stated to have been ordered to be shot despite no such order even having been shown.
Egregiously, when Adult Swim aired this episode, they neglected to include any of the post-credits segment, essentially forcing this jarring situation onto all of their viewers who watched the show as it came out. Adult Swim's decision to not include this scene is especially odd as, while they often cut out post-credit scenes, they normally did include any that were relevant to the plot.
